summary: The diff adds HighwayRushGame.tsx, useHighwayRushSound.ts, registers the route in App.tsx, adds the game card to Home.tsx, and extends achievements.ts. Most core requirements appear implemented, but several specific acceptance criteria have gaps: React Three Fiber is not used (raw Three.js imperative code is used instead), motion blur post-processing is absent, and some ad placeholder UI elements cannot be confirmed from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Use React Three Fiber for 3D rendering — the implementation uses raw Three.js imperatively with no Canvas, useFrame, or R3F components
missing_requirements.reason: The build constraint explicitly requires React Three Fiber for 3D rendering. The diff imports only 'three' and uses imperative Three.js scene/renderer setup, with no @react-three/fiber imports or JSX-based scene graph visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: At high speeds, apply a motion blur post-processing effect to the scene
missing_requirements.reason: No @react-three/postprocessing or EffectComposer/MotionBlur setup is visible in the diff. The file only imports React and Three.js.

missing_requirements.requirement: Interstitial ad placeholder zone shown after game over dismissal
missing_requirements.reason: While GamePhase type includes 'interstitial', the actual render of the interstitial ad placeholder UI cannot be confirmed from the visible truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Banner ad placeholder visible at the bottom of the main menu and game over screens
missing_requirements.reason: No banner ad placeholder UI element is visible in the truncated portion of HighwayRushGame.tsx.
